title: ConvertKit vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and AWeber. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
h1: ConvertKit vs AWeber: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms offering free tiers and creator-friendly features, but they cater to slightly different audiences. ConvertKit focuses on creators and course sellers with advanced automation, while AWeber emphasizes simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business needs.
choose_a_if: You sell online courses or digital products and need built-in commerce features
You want advanced visual automation workflows for complex customer journeys
You're a creator looking for tools specifically designed for your audience type
choose_b_if: You're a solopreneur or small blogger on a tight budget seeking simplicity
You want to automatically convert RSS feeds into email newsletters
You prefer a long-established platform with strong customer satisfaction ratings

faq.a: ConvertKit offers more advanced features and better ratings on G2, making it superior for creators and course sellers. However, AWeber excels in simplicity and customer satisfaction, earning a higher Trustpilot rating. The better choice depends on your specific needs—choose ConvertKit for feature richness or AWeber for ease of use.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month. However, ConvertKit offers a more generous free tier with 1,000 subscribers versus AWeber's 500. For budget-conscious users, AWeber wins on pricing, but ConvertKit's free tier provides more runway before paid plans.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list exports and imports. Most email marketing tools allow CSV exports, making migration straightforward. Both ConvertKit and AWeber provide customer support to assist with the migration process, ensuring you can seamlessly transfer your contacts and maintain your email marketing continuity.
